MINI MINUTES: CROSS DEFENDANT KAY PARKER'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS

Appearances:
Kenneth Walczak of Rosen Bien & Galvan (433.6830) specially appearing for cross-defendant and moving party
Conor Mack of the Law Offices of Waukeen McCoy (675-7705) for cross-complainant and responding party

Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: denied. Service was affected under CCP 415.20(a) and the affidavit of the process server reflects that the complaint was mailed. Mr. Walczak's request for 30 days to respond to the cross-complaint was denied. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/PJM/AY) Judge: Patrick J.
